description: Style Notelee brings a phase of glamour into the lives of the fashion aware crowd. This top brings out your feminine side while maintaining a gallant enigma of high octane fashion. Pair it with a denim skirt or denims to look absolutely gorgeous.Product DetailsLight pastel blue top with a high mandarin collar and a split neckline, has a half buttoned placket and short sleevesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coolDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or dry in shadeLow iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (Height 5'8" and chest 33& rdquo ) is wearing a size M
